summary: Drove the shell refit flows in a real browser. All acceptance checks held, and Playwright console reported 0 errors and 0 warnings.
steps: playwright-cli open http://127.0.0.1:7777 with a Chromium CLI config
playwright-cli snapshot on /; confirmed sidebar refs and dashboard Run console refs
playwright-cli console; observed 0 errors and 0 warnings
playwright-cli snapshot; URL was http://127.0.0.1:7777/ and dashboard showed Run console, Dispatch, and Runtime log
playwright-cli click searchbox "Search Fittings across all Faculties"
playwright-cli snapshot; search showed 4 Fittings across 3 Faculties with action buttons
playwright-cli snapshot; Settings link was hidden
playwright-cli click Quarters group header again
playwright-cli snapshot; Settings link was visible again
playwright-cli run-code assertion pass covering sidebar nav, /run redirect, /armory redirect, /compose counts/search, Quarters collapse/expand
playwright-cli console; observed 0 errors and 0 warnings
